rationale: Section 26.15 governs correction of completed tax rolls for mathematical and appraisal errors. It does not set or limit homestead exemption amounts, so increasing the §11.13(b) exemption does not conflict with its operative provisions.
quote: Except as provided by Chapters 41 and 42 of this code and in this section, the tax roll for a taxing unit may not be changed after it is completed.
_note: No conflict. §26.15 addresses post-completion tax roll corrections; the proposed §11.13(b) exemption increase affects initial exemption calculation, not the correction framework.
